title: tanacetum aureum
intro: Tanacetum aureum, also known as the golden marguerite, is a perennial flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to its content of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Tanacetum aureum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate headaches. Tanacetum aureum can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile ingredient in herbal remedies.
